products.title: SolarShine Pro Cleaning Agent (5L)
products.description: An eco-friendly, biodegradable cleaning chemical specifically formulated for B2B solar arrays. Gently lifts dust, industrial grime, and pollen without residue, boosting panel absorption.

products.title: Dual-Trim Solar Panel Brush Head
products.description: Premium B2B solar brush featuring soft micro-split nylon bristles and built-in fan rinse jets. Provides scratch-free scrubbing for maximum efficiency.

products.title: Water-Fed Telescopic Pole (6m)
products.description: High-quality, lightweight aircraft aluminum water-fed pole extending up to 6 meters. Ideal for cleaning solar panels safely from the ground.

products.title: Complete Solar Maintenance Kit
products.description: All-in-one bundle for solar array upkeep. Includes the 6m aluminum pole, water-fed brush head, 5L organic chemical spray, and squeegee.

specs.Contents: Telescopic Pole, Brush Head, 5L Spray, 12-inch Squeegee

products.title: MycoMold Biodegradable Trays (Pack of 50)
products.description: Eco-friendly agricultural trays grown from mushroom mycelium and agricultural waste. 100% home compostable, providing superior cushioning.

products.title: Kraft Organic Punnet Boxes (Pack of 100)
products.description: Recycled Kraft paperboard punnets designed specifically for organic dry mushroom farming retail display. Breathable design with side ventilation slots.

products.title: Compostable Breathable Produce Bags (500 Pack)
products.description: Lightweight, breathable checkout bags for farming fresh produce and mushrooms. Breathability prevents early rotting of delicate fungi.

products.title: MycoShield Heavy-Duty Cartons (10 Pack)
products.description: Double-walled corrugated shipping cartons with mycelium corner buffers for B2B mushroom supply chains.
